name: Dulcé Sloan
bio: Dulce Sloan is an American stand-up comedian and actress born in Miami and raised in Atlanta. She joined The Daily Show with Trevor Noah as a correspondent in 2017, sharing in an Emmy win, and voices Honeybee on the Fox animated series The Great North. She released her debut Comedy Central half-hour in 2019 and a verified Netflix set in 2021.

timeline.ev: Joins The Daily Show as a correspondent
Comedy Central Stand-Up Presents half-hour airs
Begins voicing Honeybee on The Great North
Wins Emmy for Outstanding Talk Series with The Daily Show

accolades: Emmy Award (shared) for The Daily Show

specials.t: Comedy Central Stand-Up Presents: Dulce Sloan
